description: Same content on a DIFFERENT feed and entry id. Dedupe is by content digest, so it is quiet and MUST NOT masquerade as corroboration.

input.title: Agency orders recall of Model X brake actuators after inspection findings
input.body: The National Transportation Safety Agency has ordered a recall of Model X brake actuators manufactured between 2024 and 2025 after field inspections found premature wear that could reduce braking performance.
